zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Dunbar於1137年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴時，她的父親Edgar of Dunbar11134歲，母親Alice Greystoke23歲。她和William Sinclair至少有1個兒子。她去世於1200年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年63歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Dunbar was born in 1137, in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Edgar of Dunbar, was 11134 and her mother, Alice Greystoke, was 23. She had at least 1 son with William Sinclair. She died in 1200, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Dunbar est née en 1137, à Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edgar of Dunbar, avait 11134 ans et sa mère, Alice Greystoke, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William Sinclair. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Dunbar 1137 in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edgar of Dunbar 11134 und ihre Mutter Alice Greystoke 23. Sie hatte mit William Sinclair mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Dunbar(이)가 1137년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edgar of Dunbar(은)는 11134세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Greystoke(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 William Sinclair(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

ru.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Dunbar родилась в 1137 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edgar of Dunbar было 11134 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Greystoke, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Sinclair. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
